title: Senior SEO Specialist at Zomato Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Zomato Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Zomato Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Nagpur-based team.

About Zomato Digital Technologies:
Zomato Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
